name: market-grid-smoke
description: Small report-only matrix for comparing model families, pre-fight feature transforms, and market blends against the no-vig market favorite.

variants.name: xgboost_production
variants.description: Current XGBoost model family with production pre-fight features.

variants.name: xgboost_availability
variants.description: Current XGBoost plus pre-fight feature availability indicators.

variants.name: logistic_production
variants.description: Regularized logistic baseline with production pre-fight features.

variants.name: blend_25_xgboost_75_market
variants.description: 25% XGBoost probability plus 75% no-vig market probability.

variants.name: blend_50_xgboost_50_market
variants.description: 50% XGBoost probability plus 50% no-vig market probability.

variants.name: blend_25_availability_75_market
variants.description: 25% availability-augmented XGBoost probability plus 75% no-vig market probability.
